# Result

An object that provides methods to obtain information about the result of an Installation Check or Volume Check script. 

## Overview

This object is accessed using the `my.result` property.

## Working with Result Properties

- **message**: A String describing the cause of a warning or fatal result.
- **type**: The type of the result.
- **title**: The title of the warning.

items.description: A String describing the cause of a warning or fatal result.
